news.title: Woman accused of crashing, flipping car in metro Atlanta, faces open container charge
news.summary: The Austell Police Department said a woman was taken into custody after a late-night crash on July 11.

news.title: Rapper arrested outside Georgia club where he was performing on homicide warrant
news.summary: Authorities arrested a man late Saturday night in Lamar County on an outstanding Fulton County homicide warrant.

news.title: Lil Toonk arrested on Fulton County homicide warrant
news.summary: A Georgia music artist was arrested Saturday night after deputies tracked him down on an outstanding Fulton County homicide warrant, according to officials.

news.title: Suspect arrested in connection to deadly Fourth of July shooting in Atlanta, police say
news.summary: A man was found dead underneath a bridge on Pryor Street on the Fourth of July.

news.title: Murder suspect wanted in Fulton County arrested in Lamar County, deputies say
news.summary: During the operation, investigators also recovered multiple firearms, including rifles and a handgun, along with other evidence, according to the sheriff's office.

news.title: 2 teens charged in Old Fourth Ward shooting; victim's family seeks support
news.summary: Two teenagers face murder charges following a shooting that left one person dead and three others wounded in Atlanta on Friday afternoon, according to police.

news.title: DeKalb County police find woman dead, suspect injured after early morning shooting
news.summary: A woman was found dead from a gunshot wound in DeKalb County, and a suspect was detained nearby, police report. The investigation is ongoing.
